title: Perform the daily visual maintenance checklist
summary: Use the daily maintenance checklist form to record inspection details and visually inspect the Operator Station controller, chute, stacklights, guards, and floor and rack QR codes for the conditions identified in the manual.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when completing the documented daily inspection and maintenance tasks from the OptiSweep daily maintenance checklist.
not_for: Corrective repair or replacement activities for damaged components
Troubleshooting procedures beyond the listed visual and operational checks
Escalation or recovery actions when defects are found, because the source does not provide them

responsibilities: Complete the daily maintenance checklist record fields
Perform the listed visual inspection and operational verification items
Document the inspected unit and inspection date

safety_notes: The source frames this as a daily inspection and maintenance checklist.
The source does not provide specific PPE, lockout/tagout, or production-stop requirements for this checklist.
Do not infer corrective actions from this checklist; the source only identifies inspection items.
access_or_tools_needed: Daily maintenance checklist form or photocopy
Physical access to the Operator Station, guards, floor QR codes, and rack QR codes

access_required: Access to the daily maintenance checklist
Access to the Operator Station inspection area
system_preconditions: The unit to be inspected is identified so it can be recorded on the checklist

visual_references.description: Reference view of the operator station showing the chute, stacklights, HMI, and related operator-facing components.
Reference view of the rotary station and bag rack area under the chute.
Reference HMI diagnostics screen associated with operator station troubleshooting; included as packet evidence only.
Reference figure identifying the controller location for visual identification of the operator station controller.

steps.title: Record inspection details on the checklist
steps.purpose: Document the daily inspection record before or during the checklist completion.
steps.instruction: On the daily maintenance checklist, record the Inspection Date, Inspected By, and Unit Inspected.
steps.expected_result: The checklist contains the inspection date, inspector name or identifier, and the unit inspected.
steps.healthy_condition: All required record fields are completed on the checklist.
steps.failure_condition: The checklist is missing the inspection date, inspector identification, or unit inspected.

actions.label: Complete checklist header fields
actions.exact_action: Record the Inspection Date, Inspected By, and Unit Inspected on the daily maintenance checklist.

stop_or_escalate_if: The checklist form is not available
The unit to be inspected cannot be identified for recording

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Source provides a photocopiable daily checklist with specific visual inspection items and record fields for inspection date, inspector, and unit inspected.

steps.title: Inspect the Operator Station controller for damage
steps.purpose: Verify the controller condition matches the daily inspection requirement.
steps.instruction: Visually inspect the Operator Station controller and check for damage.
steps.expected_result: No damage is observed on the Operator Station controller.
steps.healthy_condition: The controller appears intact with no visible damage.
steps.failure_condition: Damage is visible on the Operator Station controller.

actions.label: Check controller condition
actions.exact_action: Inspect the Operator Station controller for damage.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the operator station reference image to identify the operator station area and related components.
Use the controller figure as a reference for controller identification if needed.

stop_or_escalate_if: Damage is found on the controller

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Items include Operator Station controller, chute, stacklights, guards, and QR codes.
Inspect the operator station for damage to the controller, stacklights are operational, and chute is free of debris such as stuck labels.

steps.title: Ensure the Operator Station chute is free of debris
steps.purpose: Confirm the chute cleanliness condition required by the daily inspection.
steps.instruction: Inspect the Operator Station chute and verify it is free of debris.
steps.expected_result: The chute is free of debris.
steps.healthy_condition: No debris is present in the chute.
steps.failure_condition: Debris is present in the chute.

actions.label: Check chute cleanliness
actions.exact_action: Ensure the Operator Station chute is free of debris.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the operator station reference image to identify the chute location.
Use the rotary station image to orient to the chute area above the rotary station.

stop_or_escalate_if: Debris is found in the chute

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Items include Operator Station controller, chute, stacklights, guards, and QR codes.
Inspect the operator station for damage to the controller, stacklights are operational, and chute is free of debris such as stuck labels.

steps.title: Verify the stacklights are operational
steps.purpose: Confirm the operator station stacklights are functioning as required by the daily checklist.
steps.instruction: Check the stacklights at the Operator Station and verify they are operational.
steps.healthy_condition: The stacklights function as expected during the inspection.
steps.failure_condition: One or more stacklights are not operational.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the operator station reference image to identify the stacklights mounted on the top of the frame on either side of the chute.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Items include Operator Station controller, chute, stacklights, guards, and QR codes.
Inspect the operator station for damage to the controller, stacklights are operational, and chute is free of debris such as stuck labels.

steps.title: Inspect the guards and attaching hardware
steps.purpose: Verify the guards are present and the attaching hardware is secure.
steps.instruction: Inspect the guards and verify the attaching hardware is secure.
steps.expected_result: The guards show no issues and the attaching hardware is secure.
steps.healthy_condition: Guards are intact and attaching hardware is secure.
steps.failure_condition: A guard is damaged, missing, or has loose attaching hardware.

actions.label: Check guards and hardware
actions.exact_action: Inspect the guards and verify the attaching hardware is secure.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the operator station reference image to orient to the guarded operator station area.

stop_or_escalate_if: Attaching hardware is loose or not secure

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This checklist can be photocopied and used to perform daily inspection and maintenance tasks. Items include Operator Station controller, chute, stacklights, guards, and QR codes.

steps.title: Inspect all floor QR codes
steps.purpose: Verify floor QR codes are in acceptable visual condition for the daily checklist.
steps.instruction: Inspect all QR codes on the floor for damage or peeling.
steps.expected_result: All floor QR codes show no damage or peeling.
steps.healthy_condition: Floor QR codes are intact and not peeling.
steps.failure_condition: A floor QR code is damaged or peeling.

actions.label: Check floor QR codes
actions.exact_action: Inspect all QR codes on the floor for damage or peeling.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any floor QR code is damaged
Any floor QR code is peeling

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This checklist can be photocopied and used to perform daily inspection and maintenance tasks. Items include Operator Station controller, chute, stacklights, guards, and QR codes.

steps.title: Inspect all rack QR codes
steps.purpose: Verify rack QR codes are in acceptable visual condition for the daily checklist.
steps.instruction: Inspect all QR codes on the racks for damage or peeling.
steps.expected_result: All rack QR codes show no damage or peeling.
steps.healthy_condition: Rack QR codes are intact and not peeling.
steps.failure_condition: A rack QR code is damaged or peeling.

actions.label: Check rack QR codes
actions.exact_action: Inspect all QR codes on the racks for damage or peeling.

stop_or_escalate_if: Any rack QR code is damaged
Any rack QR code is peeling

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: This checklist can be photocopied and used to perform daily inspection and maintenance tasks. Items include Operator Station controller, chute, stacklights, guards, and QR codes.

success_criteria: The daily maintenance checklist is completed with inspection date, inspector, and unit inspected.
The Operator Station controller shows no damage.
The Operator Station chute is free of debris.
The guards are intact and attaching hardware is secure.
Floor QR codes show no damage or peeling.
Rack QR codes show no damage or peeling.
healthy_conditions: Guards are intact and hardware is secure.
Floor QR codes are intact and not peeling.
Rack QR codes are intact and not peeling.
failure_conditions: Damage is found on the Operator Station controller.
Debris is found in the chute.
A guard is damaged or attaching hardware is loose.
A floor QR code is damaged or peeling.
A rack QR code is damaged or peeling.
escalation_guidance: If any inspected item shows damage, debris, peeling, loose hardware, or non-operational stacklights, stop normal checklist completion for that item and escalate according to site practice; the source does not provide corrective or escalation steps.
If the checklist form is unavailable or cannot be completed, escalate according to site documentation control practice; the source does not provide an alternative method.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator station layout including chute and stacklights.
Rotary station area beneath the chute for physical orientation.
Controller reference image for identifying the controller area.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: This checklist can be photocopied and used to perform daily inspection and maintenance tasks. Items include Operator Station controller, chute, stacklights, guards, and QR codes.
Inspect the operator station for damage to the controller, stacklights are operational, and chute is free of debris such as stuck labels.

The source does not specify whether lockout/tagout is required for this checklist.
The source does not provide explicit acceptance criteria beyond the listed visual and operational conditions.
